csvPropertyValue.csvvalue: = Agent Commission % * (Vendor Product Cost + Other Vendor Costs)
Sum of Assembly mins * LOH Rate

scLOHRate*( scHeelcounter1TCTmins+ scHeelcounter2TCTmins+ scConstructiontypeTCTmins+ scOutsolestitchingTCTmins+ scUpperBottomLineUpTCTmins+ scSocklinerTCTmins+ scAttachedcomponentsduringassemblyTCTmins+ scLacingTCTmins+ scPackagingTCTmins)
= (Material Cost + CIF) * (Quantity + (Quantity * Wastage%)) for all line items in BOM section
= (Material Cost + CIF) * (Quantity * (1 + Wastage %) * (1 + Calculation Size %) for all line items in BOM section
BOM Cost as % of Quoted FOB
= Total Material Costs / Vendor Product Cost
= (Material Cost + CIF) * (Quantity * (1 + Wastage %) * (1 + Calculation Size %) for all line items in BOM section
= (Material Cost + CIF) * (Quantity + (Quantity * Wastage%)) for all line items in BOM section
= (Material Cost + CIF) * (Quantity + (Quantity * Wastage%)) for all line items in BOM section
= (Material Cost + CIF) * (Quantity + (Quantity * Wastage%)) for all line items in BOM section
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_us: = (Material Cost + CIF) * (Quantity + (Quantity * Wastage%)) for all line items in BOM section
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_gb: = (Material Cost + CIF) * (Quantity + (Quantity * Wastage%)) for all line items in BOM section

csvPropertyValue.csvvalue: = (Material Cost + CIF) * (Quantity + (Quantity * Wastage%)) for all line items in BOM section
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_us: = (Material Cost + CIF) * (Quantity + (Quantity * Wastage%)) for all line items in BOM section

csvPropertyValue.csvvalue: = (Material Cost + CIF) * (Quantity + (Quantity * Wastage%)) for all line items in BOM section
= (Material Cost + CIF) * (Quantity * (1 + Wastage %) * (1 + Calculation Size %) for all line items in BOM section
= (Material Cost + CIF) * (Quantity * (1 + Wastage %) * (1 + Calculation Size %) for all line items in BOM section
= (Material Cost + CIF) * (Quantity + (Quantity * Wastage%)) for all line items in BOM section
= (Material Cost + CIF) * (Quantity * (1 + Wastage %) * (1 + Calculation Size %) for all line items in BOM section
= Total Material Cost + Labor Cost + Overhead Cost + Profit $ + Product Testing Cost
= IF Incoterms = FOB or FCA, Vendor Total Cost + Total Duty $ US + Freight $ US + Internal Load $ US + Other $ US ELSE IF Incoterms = DDP or LDP, Vendor Total Cost + Internal Load $ US
Date used for seasonal price lookups
From Factory selected on Sourcing Config
= Vendor Product Cost - Vendor Paid Testing Cost - Hanger Cost
= First Sale Dutiable Value * (Duty % US + Tariff % US) + Flat Duty $ US + (Hanger Cost * Hanger Duty Rate)
= Vendor Total Cost * Internal Load % US
= Upper Preparation Cost + Stockfitting Cost + Assembly + Other Processes Cost
= Landed Cost Override US OR Calculated Landed Cost US
= Landed Cost US - Target Landed Cost $
= Landed Cost Variance $ / Landed Cost US
= Total Material Cost / Vendor Product Cost
= Other $ US Override OR (Vendor Total Cost * Other % US)
Sum of Other Processes mins * LOH Rate
= Overhead Override OR (Direct Labor Cost * OH%)
= (Total BOM Costs + LOH Total + Profit $ + Tooling) / (1/ (Overhead Premium %/100) - 1)
= Landed Cost US - (Total Duty $ US - First Sale Total Duty $ US)
= Profit Override OR (Total Material Cost + Labor & Overhead Cost) * Profict %)
# Recess points and # Emboss/deboss windows TCT (mins)
Sum of Stockfitting mins * LOH Rate
= (Target Retail - Landed Cost US) / Target Retail Price
# Textile/ synthetic pcs for single layer cutting
# Textile/ synthetic pcs for single layer cutting TCT (mins)
= Artwork Override OR (BOM Artwork + Additional Artwork)
= Bottom Override OR (BOM Bottom + Additional Bottom)
= Dutiable Value * (Duty % US + Tariff % US) + Flat Duty $ US + (Hanger Cost * Hanger Duty Rate)
= Insole Override OR (BOM Insole + Additional Insole)
= Labels Override OR (BOM Labels + Additional Labels)
= Lining Override OR (BOM Lining + Additional Lining)
= Main Material Override OR (BOM Main Materials + Additional Main Materials)
= (BOM Override + Tooling Amortization) OR (Main Materials + Trims + Lining + Artwork + Process + Labels + Packaging + Tooling Amortization)
= Packaging Override OR (BOM Packaging + Additional Packaging)
= Process Override OR (BOM Process + Additional Process)
= Sockliner Override OR (BOM Sockliner + Additional Sockliner)
= Sundries Override OR (BOM Sundries + Additional Sundries)
= Trims Override OR (BOM Trims + Additional Trims)
= Upper Override OR (BOM Upper + Additional Upper)
Sum of Upper Preperation mins * LOH Rate

scLOHRate*( scTextilesyntheticpcsTCTmins+ scTextilesyntheticpcsforsinglelayercuttingTCTmins+ scCutPrepLEATHERTCTmins+ scPairMatchingTCTmins+ scShoesHeightTCTmins+ scofstitchedupperpcsTCTmins+ scStitchandTurnTCTmins+ scFoldedEdgeTCTmins+ scSpecialupperconstructionTCTmins+ scPunchholesTCTmins+ scMetaleyeletsTCTmins+ scInsertedlaceloopsTCTmins+ scStitchedonlaceloopsTCTmins+ scGhilliesTCTmins+ scLockstitchoverlockstitchFlatStitchTCTmins+ scBoxstitchTCTmins+ scTriplestitchTCTmins+ scEnglishbindingTCTmins+ scFrenchbindingTCTmins+ scNosewbindingTCTmins+ scPocketconstructionTCTmins)
= Vendor Product Cost Override OR (Base Vendor Cost + 'Upcharge / Discount')
= Vendor Product Cost Override OR Total Material Costs + LOH Total + Profit $ + Tooling + Overhead Premium $
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_us: = Vendor Product Cost Override OR Total Material Costs + LOH Total + Profit $ + Tooling + Overhead Premium $
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_gb: = Vendor Product Cost Override OR Total Material Costs + LOH Total + Profit $ + Tooling + Overhead Premium $

csvPropertyValue.csvvalue: From Internal Load lookup table; RDG Fee
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_us: From Internal Load lookup table; RDG Fee
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_gb: From Internal Load lookup table; RDG Fee
